SEARCH
Package com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers

Class RegionSelectController

java.lang.Object
com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.RegionSelectController
@Component public class RegionSelectController extends Object
Controller responsible for managing the selection of regions on the map, displaying region descriptions, and navigating to the corresponding referendums.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize() throws IOException
      Initializes the RegionSelectController Sets the current page, hides navigation buttons, loads region data initializes map graphics, and sets up event handling for region selection
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs while initializing the controller

    • changeSceneToRegionReferendums

      public void changeSceneToRegionReferendums(Region region) throws IOException
      Changes the scene to the referendums view for the selected region
      Parameters:
      region - The selected region
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs while changing the scene

    • changeRegionDescription

      public void changeRegionDescription(RegionSVGPath regionSVGPath)
      Updates the region description UI based on the selected region
      Parameters:
      regionSVGPath - The RegionSVGPath representing the selected region
